name: Fruitmates: Adventure
author: Poki
description: Fruitmates: Adventure is a Match-3 puzzle game where you collect adorable fruit buddies! Match 3 identical fruit tiles in the bottom row to clear the board and win. Explore vibrant levels, unlock unique locations, and enjoy innovative Match-3 mechanics. From juicy oranges to sweet strawberries and cherries, dozens of colorful fruits are waiting for you! Whether you're looking for a relaxing escape or a challenging puzzle, Fruitmates: Adventure is packed with fruity fun. Dive in now and start your juicy adventure! How to play Fruitmates: Adventure? Click to select a tile, choose 3 identical tiles to match them. Who created Fruitmates: Adventure? Fruitmates: Adventure is created by Yellowbird Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Fruitmates: Adventure for free? You can play Fruitmates: Adventure for free on Poki. Can I play Fruitmates: Adventure on mobile devices and desktop? Fruitmates: Adventure can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
